items.title: Fixed websocket error handling
items.description: Improved Collabrador websocket connection to properly handle non-JSON welcome messages and initialize correctly on first page load. Note: Collabrador is still in development and not yet available for production use.

items.title: Enhanced Collabrador initialization
items.description: Improved Collabrador websocket initialization to work correctly on first page load when no tokens are stored. Enhanced callback handling to avoid unnecessary data fetches on authentication responses. Note: Collabrador is still in development and not yet available for production use.
